use_cases: Trigger actions like form submissions, modal opens, or navigation
Call-to-action buttons for primary user flows
Secondary actions in toolbars or card footers
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, supporting multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Styled with Tailwind CSS and follows standard accessible focus ring patterns. Includes asChild prop for polymorphic composition with other Radix primitives.
